mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM LINE WHERE line_id = #{lineId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT line_id AS lineId, phone FROM line WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN line_id = #{lineId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, line_id ASC
SELECT individual_threshold AS individualThreshold, is_threshold_active AS isThresholdActive FROM line WHERE line_id = #{lineId}
